movies.name: Mad Max: Fury Road
movies.description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners, a psychotic worshiper, and a drifter named Max.

movies.name: John Wick
movies.description: An ex-hitman comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that killed his dog and took everything from him.

movies.name: Mission: Impossible
movies.description: Ethan Hunt and his IMF team, along with some familiar allies, race against time after a mission gone wrong.

movies.name: Avengers: Endgame
movies.description: After the devastating events of Avengers: Infinity War, the universe is in ruins. With the help of remaining allies, the Avengers assemble once more to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance.

movies.name: Gladiator
movies.description: A former Roman General sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family and sent him into slavery.

movies.name: The Shawshank
movies.description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

movies.name: Forrest Gump
movies.description: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.

movies.name: The Green Mile
movies.description: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder and rape, yet who has a mysterious gift.

movies.name: A Beautiful Mind
movies.description: After John Nash, a brilliant but asocial mathematician, accepts secret work in cryptography, his life takes a turn for the nightmarish.

movies.name: Good Will Hunting
movies.description: Will Hunting, a janitor at MIT, has a gift for mathematics but needs help from a psychologist to find direction in his life.

movies.name: The Shawshank
movies.description: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

movies.name: The Grand Budapest
movies.description: A writer encounters the owner of an aging high-class hotel, who tells him of his early years serving as a lobby boy in the hotel's glorious years under an exceptional concierge.

movies.name: Tropic Thunder
movies.description: Through a series of freak occurrences, a group of actors shooting a big-budget war movie are forced to become the soldiers they are portraying.

movies.name: Groundhog Day
movies.description: A weatherman finds himself inexplicably living the same day over and over again.

movies.name: 21 Jump Street
movies.description: A pair of underachieving cops are sent back to a local high school to blend in and bring down a synthetic drug ring.
